---
title: "Replication of Mian, Sufi and Verner (2017), Table III"
output: html_document
---

## Setup

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(fixest)
library(car)
library(modelsummary)
```

## Data

```{r data}
msv <- read_dta("PASTE_FILE_PATH_HERE")

msv <- msv |>
  arrange(.data$CountryCode, .data$year) |>
  group_by(.data$CountryCode) |>
  mutate(
    ca_l1 = if_else(
      .data$year - lag(.data$year) == 1,
      lag(.data$CA_USD),
      NA_real_
    ),
    ca_l2 = if_else(
      .data$year - lag(.data$year, 2) == 2,
      lag(.data$CA_USD, 2),
      NA_real_
    ),
    ca_l3 = if_else(
      .data$year - lag(.data$year, 3) == 3,
      lag(.data$CA_USD, 3),
      NA_real_
    ),
    ca_sum = .data$ca_l1 + .data$ca_l2 + .data$ca_l3,
    net_foreign_debt_positive = if_else(
      is.na(.data$ca_sum),
      NA_real_,
      as.numeric(.data$ca_sum < 0)
    ),
    household_debt_interaction =
      .data$net_foreign_debt_positive * .data$L1D3HHD_GDP
  ) |>
  ungroup()

main_sample <- msv |>
  filter(.data$mainsmp1 == 1)

common_sample <- main_sample |>
  filter(!is.na(.data$L1D3NFD_GDP))
```

## Regressions

```{r regressions}
# These settings reproduce the covariance matrix reported by xtivreg2.
stata_ssc <- ssc(
  K.adj = FALSE,
  G.adj = FALSE,
  t.df = "conventional"
)

fit_table_3 <- function(formula, data) {
  feols(
    formula,
    data = data,
    vcov = ~CountryCode + year,
    ssc = stata_ssc,
    notes = FALSE
  )
}

models <- list(
  "(1)" = fit_table_3(
    lnGDP_Fd3 ~ L1D3PD_GDP | CountryCode,
    common_sample
  ),
  "(2)" = fit_table_3(
    lnGDP_Fd3 ~ L1D3HHD_GDP | CountryCode,
    common_sample
  ),
  "(3)" = fit_table_3(
    lnGDP_Fd3 ~ L1D3NFD_GDP | CountryCode,
    common_sample
  ),
  "(4)" = fit_table_3(
    lnGDP_Fd3 ~ L1D3HHD_GDP + L1D3NFD_GDP | CountryCode,
    main_sample
  ),
  "(5)" = fit_table_3(
    lnGDP_Fd3 ~ L1lnGDP_d1 + L2lnGDP_d1 + L3lnGDP_d1 +
      L1D3HHD_GDP + L1D3NFD_GDP | CountryCode,
    main_sample
  ),
  "(6)" = fit_table_3(
    lnGDP_Fd3 ~ L1lnGDP_d1 + L2lnGDP_d1 + L3lnGDP_d1 +
      L1D3HHD_GDP + L1D3NFD_GDP + L1D3GD_GDP_Sol2 |
      CountryCode,
    main_sample
  ),
  "(7)" = fit_table_3(
    lnGDP_Fd3 ~ L1lnGDP_d1 + L2lnGDP_d1 + L3lnGDP_d1 +
      L1D3HHD_GDP + L1D3NFD_GDP + L1D3NFL_GDP | CountryCode,
    main_sample
  ),
  "(8)" = fit_table_3(
    lnGDP_Fd3 ~ L1lnGDP_d1 + L2lnGDP_d1 + L3lnGDP_d1 +
      L1D3HHD_GDP + L1D3NFD_GDP + net_foreign_debt_positive +
      household_debt_interaction | CountryCode,
    main_sample
  )
)

sample_sizes <- models |>
  map_int(nobs)

stopifnot(
  identical(
    unname(sample_sizes),
    c(695L, 695L, 695L, 695L, 695L, 627L, 636L, 636L)
  )
)
```

## Table III

```{r table-3}
equality_test <- function(model) {
  test <- linearHypothesis(
    model,
    "L1D3HHD_GDP = L1D3NFD_GDP",
    test = "Chisq"
  )

  test[2, "Pr(>Chisq)"]
}

equality_p_values <- models[4:7] |>
  map_dbl(equality_test) |>
  sprintf(fmt = "%.3f")

within_r_squared <- models |>
  map_dbl(\(model) fitstat(model, "wr2")[[1]]) |>
  signif(3) |>
  as.character()

extra_rows <- tribble(
  ~term, ~"(1)", ~"(2)", ~"(3)", ~"(4)", ~"(5)", ~"(6)", ~"(7)", ~"(8)",
  "Country fixed effects",
  "✓", "✓", "✓", "✓", "✓", "✓", "✓", "✓",
  "Distributed lag in Δy",
  "", "", "", "", "✓", "✓", "✓", "✓",
  "Test for equality of βHH and βF, p-value",
  "", "", "", equality_p_values[1], equality_p_values[2],
  equality_p_values[3], equality_p_values[4], "",
  "Within R-squared",
  within_r_squared[1], within_r_squared[2], within_r_squared[3],
  within_r_squared[4], within_r_squared[5], within_r_squared[6],
  within_r_squared[7], within_r_squared[8],
  "Observations",
  as.character(sample_sizes[1]), as.character(sample_sizes[2]),
  as.character(sample_sizes[3]), as.character(sample_sizes[4]),
  as.character(sample_sizes[5]), as.character(sample_sizes[6]),
  as.character(sample_sizes[7]), as.character(sample_sizes[8])
)

coefficient_labels <- c(
  "L1D3PD_GDP" = "Δ3 private debt",
  "L1D3HHD_GDP" = "Δ3 household debt",
  "L1D3NFD_GDP" = "Δ3 firm debt",
  "L1D3GD_GDP_Sol2" = "Δ3 government debt",
  "L1D3NFL_GDP" = "Δ3 net foreign debt",
  "net_foreign_debt_positive" = "1(Δ3 net foreign debt > 0)",
  "household_debt_interaction" =
    "Δ3 household debt × 1(Δ3 net foreign debt > 0)"
)

modelsummary(
  models,
  coef_map = coefficient_labels,
  statistic = "({std.error})",
  fmt = fmt_significant(3),
  stars = c("+" = 0.10, "*" = 0.05, "**" = 0.01),
  gof_omit = ".*",
  add_rows = extra_rows,
  title = paste(
    "Table III. Household Debt Expansion Predicts Lower Subsequent Growth",
    "Dependent variable: Δ3 y(t+3)",
    sep = "<br>"
  ),
  notes = paste(
    "Country fixed effects are included in all specifications.",
    "Standard errors are clustered by country and year."
  )
)
```
